regional_cost_note: Hamilton waterproofing contractors typically charge $900–$2,800 for bathroom waterproofing, $85–$190/m² for deck membranes, and $65–$140/m² for roof membranes. Waikato rates are generally 10–15% below Auckland for most trades. Always use a licensed waterproofer for wet areas — poor waterproofing is one of the most common and costly defects in NZ homes.
